question: [File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/DownloaderProperties.java -> Scope: High: Preventing gossip of a transaction or multiple transactions'] [Function: isEnabled()] Can an unprivileged external user exploit the Flux.fromIterable(nodes) in downloadAndParseSigFiles() by causing the consensusNodeService.getNodes() to return an empty collection (e.g., via address book manipulation), resulting in an empty sigFilesMap and silently skipping all transactions in the current batch?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/DownloaderProperties.java -> Scope: High: Preventing gossip of a transaction or multiple transactions'] [Function: getCommon()] Can an unprivileged external user exploit the take(listLimit) operator in downloadAndParseSigFiles() where listLimit=1 when isEnabled()=false, to ensure that only one signature file is ever processed per cycle, effectively throttling gossip ingestion to a single transaction file per poll?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/DownloaderProperties.java -> Scope: High: Preventing gossip of a transaction or multiple transactions'] [Function: isEnabled()] Can an unprivileged external user exploit the verifySignatures() method's FileOperationException catch block, which only logs a warning and continues to the next node, to cause all nodes to throw FileOperationException for a target file, exhausting all nodes and returning false without ever gossiping the target transactions?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/DownloaderProperties.java -> Scope: High: Preventing gossip of a transaction or multiple transactions'] [Function: getCommon()] Can an unprivileged external user exploit the region=us-east-1 default in CommonDownloaderProperties to perform a DNS rebinding or BGP hijack attack that redirects S3 requests to an attacker-controlled endpoint, serving modified stream files that omit target transactions from gossip?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/DownloaderProperties.java -> Scope: High: Preventing gossip of a transaction or multiple transactions'] [Function: isEnabled()] Can an unprivileged external user exploit the streamFileNotifier.verified() call in onVerified() to inject a crafted stream file that triggers a downstream notifier exception, causing the entire onVerified() to fail and preventing the lastStreamFile pointer from advancing, causing the downloader to repeatedly attempt and fail on the same file?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/DownloaderProperties.java -> Scope: High: Preventing gossip of a transaction or multiple transactions'] [Function: getCommon()] Can an unprivileged external user exploit the Objects.requireNonNull() call on the Flux.block() result in downloadAndParseSigFiles() to cause a NullPointerException by making the reactive stream return null, crashing the download cycle and suppressing gossip of all transactions in that batch?
